text: Machine learning is a way for computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed for every task. One common type is supervised learning. In this method, the computer is given training data, which includes examples with the correct answers. Using this data, the computer builds a model, which is like a set of rules. Then, when new data is presented, the model can make predictions, such as identifying objects in photos or estimating prices. Finally, the accuracy of these predictions is measured to see how well the model performs. The goal is to improve the model until it can make reliable predictions on new, unseen data.
